steps.title: Compare the areas
steps.content:
For similar rectangles, areas scale by the square of the side-length scale factor. The smaller-to-larger area ratio is
$$
\frac{90}{810}=\frac{1}{9}
$$

steps.title: Convert area scale to side scale
steps.content:
Take the square root of the area ratio to get the side-length scale factor from $\text{JKLM}$ to $\text{PQRS}$:
$$
\sqrt{\frac{1}{9}}=\frac{1}{3}
$$

steps.title: Scale the long side
steps.content: The longest side of $\text{JKLM}$ is $45$ inches, so the corresponding longest side of $\text{PQRS}$ is $$ 45(\frac{1}{3})=15 $$ The answer is C.
